headings.style: High-contrast serif, editorial feel. Use tracking-tighter for impact.

body.style: Clean, geometric sans-serif for high legibility in dark mode.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.caption: text-sm font-sans text-foreground/60 tracking-widest uppercase

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for sections. Gap-8 to gap-16 for grids.
layout.grid: Asymmetric, editorial grids. Overlapping elements. Use Mode A: Tetris Grid for portfolio.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/60 border-b border-white/5
surfaces.cards: Flat solid backgrounds (bg-secondary/50) with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/5). No heavy shadows, rely on contrast.

motion.philosophy: Cinematic and deliberate. No fast, jarring animations. Slow reveals, parallax layers, smooth momentum scrolling.

patterns.page_load: Premium loading screen with brand mark reveal and slow fade out to hero section.
patterns.scroll: Parallax on background images. Text lines reveal (staggered translateY and opacity) on scroll.
patterns.hover: Magnetic buttons for CTAs. Image zoom within container for portfolio cards.
patterns.marquee: Slow, elegant infinite marquee (react-fast-marquee) for service tags with large outline typography.

sections.name: Loading Screen
sections.design: Full screen bg-background. Central minimal logo/text reveal. Elegant progress counter.

sections.name: Hero
sections.design: Full-screen (100vh) image with dark gradient overlay (bg-black/40). Large cinematic H1 text centrally or asymmetrically aligned. Magnetic 'Book Appointment' button.

sections.name: About
sections.design: Split layout: Large elegant typography on one side, stacked overlapping images on the other. Animated counters for stats (10+ years, 1000+ reviews).

sections.name: Services
sections.design: Minimalist layout. Interactive cards for Hair, Skin, Bridal, Spa, Nails, Makeup. Hover expands or reveals image.

sections.name: Portfolio/Gallery
sections.design: Masonry grid of high-quality before/after or styled shots. Asymmetric gaps. Lightbox or hover-zoom.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.design: Carousel of reviews. Large quote marks in primary color. Mention '4.6/1012 reviews' prominently.

sections.name: Team
sections.design: Grid of team portraits. Grayscale to color on hover. Name and specialty overlay.

sections.name: Pricing/Process
sections.design: Clean tabular or accordion style for pricing. Scroll storytelling timeline for process.

sections.name: Booking Form
sections.design: Shadcn based. Date/time slot picker, service selector. Glassmorphism container.

sections.name: Contact & Footer
sections.design: Dark, massive spacing (py-32). Large brand name text (text-[10vw]). Map embed, social links.

components.buttons: Magnetic effect, thin borders, transparent background with primary color text, or solid primary color with dark text for primary CTA.
components.forms: Shadcn Input/Select. Underline inputs (border-b only) or minimalist solid dark inputs. Focus rings in primary color.
components.accordions: Minimal lines, slow smooth expansion for FAQs.

hero.description: Contemporary and sophisticated salon interior with stylish furniture and lighting.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
